m:Sender.c:Name: Statistische Amt der Europäischen Union (Eurostat)
Statistical Office of the European Union (Eurostat)
Office de statistique de l'Union européenne (Eurostat)

c:Annotation.c:AnnotationText: Standard code list
Eurostat Standard Code Lists
Not derived

s:Codelist.c:Name: Classification of activities for time use - 2018
Klassifikation der Aktivitäten für Zeitverwendungen - 2018
Classification des activités pour l'emploi du temps - 2018
s:Codelist.c:Description: This code list is based on the classification of activities for time use. It is a three-level hierarchical classification, composed of major divisions, divisions and groups of all possible activities undertaken by the general population during the 24 hours that make up the day. It is used in the Harmonised European Time Use Surveys (HETUS) to quantify how much time people spend on various activities.

c:Annotation.c:AnnotationText: Standard code, follows Eurostat Standard Code List Guidelines
Standard code, follows Eurostat Standard Code List Guidelines
This aggregate includes the ACL groups 011, 012, 031, 032, 039

s:Code.c:Name: Personal care except eating
Körperpflege außer Essen
Soins personnels à l’exception des repas

c:Annotation.c:AnnotationText: Standard code, follows Eurostat Standard Code List Guidelines
This aggregate includes the ACL groups 011, 012, 021, 031, 032, 039
Standard code, follows Eurostat Standard Code List Guidelines
This aggregate includes the ACL groups 011, 012

Standard code, follows Eurostat Standard Code List Guidelines

s:Code.c:Name: Other or unspecified personal care
Sonstige oder nicht spezifizierte Körperpflege
Autres ou soins personnels non spécifiés

c:Annotation.c:AnnotationText: Standard code, follows Eurostat Standard Code List Guidelines
This aggregate includes the ACL groups 111, 121, 129, 211, 212, 213, 214, 215, 219, 221

Standard code, follows Eurostat Standard Code List Guidelines
This aggregate includes the ACL groups 111, 121, 129

s:Code.c:Name: Employment, related activities and travel as part of/during main and second job
Beschäftigung, damit verbundene Tätigkeiten und Reisen im Rahmen der Haupt- und Nebentätigkeit

c:Annotation.c:AnnotationText: Standard code, follows Eurostat Standard Code List Guidelines
Standard code, follows Eurostat Standard Code List Guidelines

s:Code.c:Name: Working time in main and second job (including short breaks and travel at work)
Arbeitszeit in der Haupt- und Nebentätigkeit (einschließlich Kurzpausen und Arbeitswege)
Temps de travail dans l’emploi principal et secondaire, y compris les pauses courtes et les déplacements

c:Annotation.c:AnnotationText: Standard code, follows Eurostat Standard Code List Guidelines
This aggregate includes the ACL groups 121, 129

s:Code.c:Name: Activities related to employment
Tätigkeiten im Zusammenhang mit der Erwerbstätigkeit
Activités liées à l'emploi

c:Annotation.c:AnnotationText: Standard code, follows Eurostat Standard Code List Guidelines

s:Code.c:Name: Lunch break in main and second jobs
Mittagspause in Haupt- und Nebentätigkeiten
Pause repas dans les emplois principaux et secondaires

c:Annotation.c:AnnotationText: Standard code, follows Eurostat Standard Code List Guidelines

s:Code.c:Name: Other or unspecified activities related to employment
Sonstige oder nicht näher bezeichnete berufsbezogene Tätigkeiten
